messagesOfTheDay: All campaign missions are now available for deployment. Good luck out there, soldier.
Addressed stability issues and improved menu navigation. Save system now operational across all modes.
Team Deathmatch and Domination now available in core matchmaking rotation. Get your squad together.
Thank you to our community for 10 million players worldwide. See you on the front lines.
Weapon balance adjustments and performance improvements deployed across all modes.
Double XP weekend is active now through Monday. Rank up faster in all game modes.
Party connection stability has been upgraded. Matchmaking improvements are now live on all servers.
Check the barracks for your service record and recent accolades. New missions are waiting.
Resolved a rare crash when navigating the multiplayer lobby. Servers are back online.
All servers are operational. Squad up and dominate the leaderboards.

missions.name: SemperFi
missions.title: Semper Fi
missions.description: The Marines assault the beaches of Betio Island. Heavy resistance expected on all sectors.

missions.name: LittleResistance
missions.title: Little Resistance
missions.description: Advance through the jungles of Peleliu and secure the enemy stronghold.

missions.name: HardLanding
missions.title: Hard Landing
missions.description: Secure the airfield on Peleliu under heavy mortar fire. Extraction is not an option.

missions.name: Vendetta
missions.title: Vendetta
missions.description: Fight alongside Reznov in the ruins of Stalingrad. One shot. One kill.

missions.name: TheirLandTheirBlood
missions.title: Their Land, Their Blood
missions.description: Push through the Russian countryside and drive the enemy back.

missions.name: BurnEmOut
missions.title: Burn 'Em Out
missions.description: Use flamethrowers to clear fortified positions in the jungle.

missions.name: Relentless
missions.title: Relentless
missions.description: Fight through the industrial district of Stalingrad. No surrender.

missions.name: BloodAndIron
missions.title: Blood & Iron
missions.description: Command a tank through enemy lines and break the siege.

missions.name: RingOfSteel
missions.title: Ring of Steel
missions.description: Defend the outskirts of Berlin against overwhelming forces.

missions.name: Eviction
missions.title: Eviction
missions.description: Clear buildings in Berlin block by block. Room by room.

missions.name: BlackCats
missions.title: Black Cats
missions.description: Fly a PBY Catalina on a rescue mission through enemy waters.

missions.name: BlowtorchAndCorkscrew
missions.title: Blowtorch & Corkscrew
missions.description: Assault Okinawa's beaches and clear the cave networks.

missions.name: BreakingPoint
missions.title: Breaking Point
missions.description: Fight through the caves of Okinawa. The enemy is cornered.

missions.name: HeartOfTheReich
missions.title: Heart of the Reich
missions.description: Storm the Reichstag. This is the final push.

missions.name: Downfall
missions.title: Downfall
missions.description: The final assault on Berlin. End it.

difficulties.name: Recruit
difficulties.description: We've got you covered. Enemies are less aggressive and deal reduced damage.

difficulties.name: Regular
difficulties.description: A balanced challenge. Enemies are tactical and deadly.

difficulties.name: Hardened
difficulties.description: Enemies are aggressive and accurate. Only the strong survive.

difficulties.name: Veteran
difficulties.description: The ultimate test. Enemies are relentless and lethal.
